rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes for port-level contracts
Use implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings and assignments
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Implementation annexes are for assignments and bindings valid in that scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq name : type = expression; for equation declarations
Use assume/guarantee syntax with labeled expressions
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not use AADL property names as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports
